title: Opening for Production Engineer at Greaves Cotton

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Greaves Cotton
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Greaves Cotton in Ahmedabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Greaves Cotton:
Greaves Cotton is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton!
